problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: If Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial is applied to chemical, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
